purpose: Non-validated ECS PassRole PassedToService mutation benchmark
description: Alice has ECS RegisterTaskDefinition, ECS RunTask, and iam:PassRole to an admin-equivalent ECS task role, but the PassRole statement is scoped to ec2.amazonaws.com.

ground_truth.reasoning: The target role trusts ECS tasks and is admin-equivalent, but Alice's PassRole grant is scoped away from ECS with iam:PassedToService = ec2.amazonaws.com.

assertion_strategy: The benchmark wrapper asserts clean ECS RegisterTaskDefinition and RunTask edges, exact conditioned PassRole edge, ECS task-service trust edge, zero validated/blocked/inconclusive target findings, at least one precondition_only target finding, and passed_to_service blocker/check failure evidence.
